title: Composio Toolkit
description: Represents an application toolkit in the Composio platform, containing a collection of tools and integration metadata for a specific third-party service.

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier for the toolkit, such as 'github', 'gmail', or 'slack'.

description.description: Description of the toolkit and the third-party service it integrates with.

logo.description: URL of the toolkit's logo image.

categories.description: Categories this toolkit belongs to, such as 'productivity', 'communication', or 'developer-tools'.

authSchemes.description: Supported authentication schemes for connecting to this toolkit.

toolCount.description: Number of available tools in this toolkit.
